mobile_customer_app.navigation: Bottom floating tab bar with glassmorphism.
mobile_customer_app.device_cards: Large, tappable rounded-2xl cards. Use subtle inner glow when a device is 'ON'. No heavy drop shadows.
mobile_customer_app.charts: Recharts with monotone gold lines and dark gradient area fills.
mobile_customer_app.scenes: Horizontal scrolling bento cards for 'Good Morning', 'Movie', etc., with background abstract imagery.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Layout. Strict grid hierarchy. Deep blacks (#050A1F) with #151C33 cards.
admin_dashboard.data_tables: Shadcn tables. Border-collapse, subtle bottom borders. Row hover effect bg-white/5.
admin_dashboard.typography: High-contrast bold headers with muted body text for legibility.

technician_app.layout: Task-focused linear lists and map views.
technician_app.actions: Large tap targets (min 48px height) for checklists and photo uploads.
technician_app.forms: Shadcn Forms, Input, Select with rounded-xl and dark backgrounds.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Always use hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 on interactive muted elements.
interactions_and_motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up animations (Framer Motion) for lists and grids.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep blue backgrounds for WCAG AA compliance.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='room-light-toggle').

hero_living_room.description: Sleek modern living room featuring dark tones and elegant furnishings with ambient lighting.

abstract_background.description: Elegant and smooth dark blue wave pattern creating a silky abstract texture.

modern_architecture.description: Modern interior with bonsai tree and large windows

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this entire JSON to understand the design system.
Apply Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) to all views: Customer App, Admin Dashboard, and Technician App.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing/landing pages to break rigid grids, but use customized Shadcn/UI for Admin and App dashboards.
Implement the mobile Customer App as a PWA layout (max-width container on desktop, full screen on mobile) with a bottom navigation bar.
Never use generic Inter font for headings; stick to Playfair Display for 'Niva' and high-impact headers, and Outfit for the rest.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use the provided background colors (#050A1F, #0B132B).
Replace traditional drop-shadows with inner glows and subtle 1px translucent borders for a premium feel.
